events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce JSON answer. Need decide compliance. Scenario: heavy industrial, baseplates & anchor bolts, observed field condition: insufficient anchor bolt projection. Work rough-complete. Reference API RP 686. Need determine if meets applicable code/spec/drawing/manufacturer requirement.

Insufficient anchor bolt projection is a defect/non-compliance. Anchor bolts must project enough above baseplate top to fully engage nut and washer per API RP 686 (Recommended Practice for Machinery Installation and Installation Design). Insufficient projection means nuts may not be fully threaded, inadequate engagement, risk of loosening, equipment movement, structural failure. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? In heavy industrial rotating equipment, insufficient anchor bolt projection can cause equipment loosening, misalignment, catastrophic failure. But at rough-complete, maybe high. Let's assess: anchor bolt projection insufficient means nut engagement less than required; could be critical if equipment under dynamic loads. API RP 686 likely requires bolt projection to allow full nut engagement plus extra. Non-compliance. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Confidence 0.95. Findings: anchor bolt projection below specified/ required minimum; nuts cannot be fully engaged. Actions: remove/replace anchor bolts or extend/replace to achieve required projection; verify torque and alignment; consult engineer; rework before grouting/final acceptance. References: API RP 686. Need include all fields. value? Not asked numeric reading; can be 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list. workable empty list. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0.

Need output exactly JSON, no prose. Ensure valid JSON.
